description_long: This object is a rectangular loaf of white sandwich bread with a golden-brown crust on the top and sides. The loaf is partially sliced, with several even slices visible and two slices separated and lying in front of the loaf. The crust is slightly darker on the top, showing a toasted appearance, while the sides are lighter and more matte. The interior of the bread is soft, airy, and pale white, with a fine, even crumb structure. The slices are uniform in thickness, and the overall loaf has a classic, mass-produced appearance typical of store-bought bread. There is no visible packaging, branding, or labeling present on the bread.
description: A rectangular loaf of white sandwich bread with a golden-brown crust and several even slices, two of which are separated in front. The bread has a soft, airy white interior and a slightly toasted top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sliced face of the loaf and two separated slices lying in front, highlighting the soft white interior and golden-brown crust.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the length of the loaf with visible slice lines and one separated slice, emphasizing the lighter side crust.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the unsliced end of the loaf with a rounded, pale crust and no separated slices visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the sliced face turned away, showing the loaf's length and two separated slices lying to the side.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is smooth and evenly browned, with a slightly darker, toasted appearance on the top and lighter, matte sides. There are no visible seeds, flour dusting, or scoring patterns.
